nasb.text: How beautiful is your love, my sister, my bride! How much better is your love than wine, And the fragrance of your oils Than all kinds of spices!

esv.text: How beautiful is your love, my sister, my bride! How much better is your love than wine, and the fragrance of your oils than any spice!

cnv.text: 我的妹妹，我的新婦啊！ 你的愛情多麼美麗。 你的愛情比酒更好。 你膏油的香氣勝過一切香料。

ccb.text: 我的妹妹，我的新娘啊， 你的爱比美酒更香甜。 你身上洋溢的芬芳远胜过一切香料。
